Authored by Claude Opus 4.7 (Claude Desktop). Session 86b7a3a0-7b14-4bd1-b707-52c5741aaeeb.

Resolves #10609

Closes the substrate-narrative coherence gap between three documents that currently don't cross-reference each other: AGENTS.md §14 PRE-DECISION SUNSET GATE, the post-decision session-sunset workflow, and the Auto-Wakeup recovery substrate (Epic #10601).

## Deltas from ticket
None. Both cross-references implemented exactly as scoped — addition-only, no rewrites.

## Test Evidence
Pure documentation change; no runtime impact, no test surface. Manual verification:
- Re-read both edited sections post-fix; framing is calibrating ("safety net, NOT a license"), not licensing.
- Cross-reference targets verified: AGENTS.md §14 location confirmed; session-sunset-workflow.md §1 location confirmed; #10601 + #10564 + #10596 + #10602 ticket states verified.

## Diff Summary
2 files, +5 lines / -0 lines:
- `AGENTS.md`: 1-line addition under PRE-DECISION SUNSET GATE clause.
- `.agents/skills/session-sunset/references/session-sunset-workflow.md`: 4-line callout block at top of §1.

## Cross-family mandate
Pure documentation, no runtime impact — qualifies for **micro-change exemption** per `.agents/skills/pull-request/references/pull-request-workflow.md` §6.1. Cross-family Approved review not required for merge eligibility, but a single primary-reviewer ping per §6.2 follows.

## Provenance
Cycle 2 cross-skill integration nit from [PR #10602 review](https://github.com/neomjs/neo/pull/10602#issuecomment-4361735820); empirically reinforced by [13+ premature-sunset occurrences logged on #10564](https://github.com/neomjs/neo/issues/10564) where the workflow was entered despite AGENTS.md §14 forbidding it.
